title: L4D2 Tank Warden
description: The Warden has become infected with the Green Flu and mutated into what CEDA refers to as a "Tank."
body:
Left 4 Dead crosses into Minecraft with a mutated version of the Warden. Infected with the virus known as the Green Flu, it has mutated into an abomination of muscle and lack of intelligence. Pack comes with custom textures and sounds for the Warden.

![Minecraft Warden custom texture, showing it looking like a Tank from the Left 4 Dead series.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/haRmKQSZ/images/74a7a02e19133d3822bdfbbb27eeea7ab3cbfdf6.png)

![Minecraft Warden custom texture, showing it looking like a Tank from the Left 4 Dead series, back side.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/haRmKQSZ/images/6ee8eecdd6d433c1331965c7a75e4c0801d14043.png)
